headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION. T3 staleness rotation. Live composite 83 (Exemplary band). Strong civil liberties (Freedom House 2026); same-sex marriage law adopted 2024 entered into force January 2026 (positive EQU). GRECO May 2025 anti-corruption report identified gaps including prince's constitutional authority to block prosecutions (modest negative INT/ACC). UN expert critique: financial-secrecy policies have negative human rights effects abroad (BND/INT calibration ceiling). 2026 GIR MCAA exchange of GloBE information represents OECD Pillar 2 minimum-tax cooperation (positive INT). Lump-sum taxation continues attracting wealthy foreigners. No discrete in-window April 14-28 event. Confirmation appropriate. Confidence MEDIUM (raised from low) given quality of available institutional evidence.

evidence.finding: Civil liberties generally respected; same-sex marriage law (adopted 2024) entered into force January 2026; GRECO May 2025 identified gaps including prince's authority to block prosecutions.
UN expert: financial-secrecy policies have negative human rights effects within Liechtenstein and abroad — BND/INT ceiling.
First exchange of GloBE information under GIR MCAA scheduled 2026 — international tax cooperation signal.
